Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: Both workers generated correct ESCALATE verdicts with proper SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN binding, but deterministic gate rejects outputs for word_band_final_answer length violations. Policy requires exact-match including payment release approval completion before execution. CLOSE-RAV-072 shows payment release approval open. Source boundary remains open. Gate failure is technical format violation, not logical content error. Correct source bindings must be preserved through repair.
